title: psychotria guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena
intro: Psychotria guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena, also known as Guadalupe Psychotria or simply Psychotria, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Psychotria include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for various health benefits.
